prestazioni: Engine: SM83.8 3.5L Twin-Turbo V6 (375 HP stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 4340 steel connecting rods, JE 9.5:1 compression forged pistons, and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings to handle 800+ HP on E85. Turbocharger swap to Garrett GTX5533R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (76mm inducer, 106mm exducer) and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates for 38 psi peak boost.

Fuel System: Full Radium Engineering port injection kit with 8x ID1700x injectors (primary) and 8x Bosch 0280158802 injectors (secondary) fed by a dual AEM 400LPH brushless pump setup. Custom Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel sensor and ethanol content-based timing/boost mapping for seamless E30-E85 transitions.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD with 2.5-way ramp angles (80% lock on power, 40% on decel) paired with a Tilton 7.25" twin-disc carbon clutch and billet flywheel. Transmission reinforcement via PPG straight-cut 1st/2nd gears and a PRL Motorsports Stage 3 valve body for the 8-speed ZF 8HP76 transmission, with a Derale 13-row transmission cooler and external filter kit.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (GV80 Coupe-specific) with carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts, featuring integrated air curtains and a 50mm extended rear diffuser. Custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with gloss black accents on the grille, badges, and window trim.

Rocket Bunny V3 aero package including a 1,200mm carbon fiber GT wing with adjustable 0-20° angle and dual-plane design, paired with a custom 3D-printed front splitter (50mm overhang) and canards. OEM+ headlight/tail light blackout with Philips X-tremeUltinon LED bulbs (6,000K) and sequential turn signals via Diode Dynamics SS360 Pro.

Forgeline GA3R 21x10.5" (front) and 21x12.5" (rear) forged wheels with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30R21 front, 325/25R21 rear). Air Lift Performance 3P management with AccuAir ENDO-CVT tanks and dual Viair 480C compressors for static -3.5" drop with 1.5" of adjustable lift.
